# UC-22.58.8 · France LPM master compliance dashboard + Direction Générale + Délégué OIV attestation roll-up

> **Criticality:** Critical &middot; **Difficulty:** Advanced &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Compliance, Governance &middot; **Wave:** Run &middot; **Status:** Verified

*Tous les contrôles LPM se concentrent dans un tableau de bord unique pour le Délégué OIV et la Direction Générale, avec attestation mensuelle.*

---

## Description

Daily roll-up showing UC-22.58.x evidence health.

## Value

Direction Générale + Délégué OIV-facing scorecard; defensible in ANSSI/PASSI inspections.

## Implementation

(1) Schedule UC-22.58.8 daily. (2) Build the `LPM Master Scorecard` dashboard. (3) Sign-off monthly by Délégué OIV.

## Evidence

Saved search `UC-22.58.8` archived daily to `audit_evidence` with `lpm_clause="LPM-master-rollup"`. Every row pins (uc, evidence_rows, last_evidence, hours_since_evidence, health).

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Force any UC-22.58.x to stop firing for 48 hours. UC-22.58.8 MUST flag staleness within 24h.

### Negative scenario

All UC-22.58.x evidence current. UC-22.58.8 MUST roll up green.

## Detailed Implementation

## Prerequisites

All UC-22.58.1 through UC-22.58.7 running.

## Step 1 — Schedule

```ini
[UC-22.58.8: LPM Master Roll-Up]
cron_schedule = 31 16 * * *
actions = summary_index, notable
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.58.8,reg=FR-LPM,clause=LPM-master-rollup
alert.severity = 4
```

## Step 2 — Runbook

Monthly Délégué OIV review and Direction Générale sign-off.

**FR-specific failure modes**:
- **Délégué OIV personal liability**: emphasize defensibility; every UC must stand alone for ANSSI/PASSI inspection.
- **Inter-secteur correlation**: a multi-secteur OIV may have several sub-rollups; aggregate carefully.

## SPL

```spl
search index=audit_evidence reg=FR-LPM earliest=-30d@d
| eval uc = case(
    match(_raw, "uc=22\.58\."), "22.58." + replace(_raw, ".*uc=22\.58\.(\d+).*", "\1"),
    1=1, "unknown")
| stats count as evidence_rows latest(_time) as last_evidence by uc
| eval hours_since_evidence = round((now() - last_evidence) / 3600, 1)
| eval health = case(
    hours_since_evidence > 48, "stale",
    evidence_rows = 0, "missing",
    1=1, "current")
| sort uc
| table uc evidence_rows last_evidence hours_since_evidence health
```

## Visualization

(Panel 1) Per-UC health. (Panel 2) Trend (12-month). (Panel 3) Top outstanding. (Panel 4) Délégué OIV monthly attestation history.

## Known False Positives

1. **UC cadence drift**: tune per UC cadence (some run every 4h, some daily).

**Suppression mechanism**: KV Store `lpm_22_58_8_exceptions` with documented Délégué OIV approval.

## References

- [Code de la défense (Partie réglementaire) — OIV](https://www.legifrance.gouv.fr/codes/section_lc/LEGITEXT000006071307/LEGISCTA000032295434/)
